headline: Altcoin Rally Falters, Bitcoin Dominance Surges 5%

article.title: Bitcoin rotations into altcoins collapses: Have altseasons 'disappeared'?
article.summary: BTC's crypto market dominance is holding above a key support, signaling Bitcoin may keep absorbing capital from altcoins and delay a broader altseason.

headline: Euro Law Revamp Sparks $1T Crypto Overhaul

article.title: Crypto industry looks to stablecoins and DeFi revisions in MiCA 2.0
article.summary: The European Commission is seeking comment on how it can tweak MiCA, its regulatory framework for the crypto and blockchain industries.

headline: Core PCE Inflation Jumps 4.3% Amid Fed Rate Hike

article.title: Fed’s Favorite Gauge Is Seen Showing Faster Inflation
article.summary: The latest update to the Federal Reserve’s favorite inflation gauge is unlikely to challenge a growing consensus at the US central bank around the need for interest-rate hikes this year.

headline: Lula Extends 5% Lead Over Bolsonaro Amid Bank Fallout

article.title: Brazil’s Lula Holds Lead Against Bolsonaro After Bank Scandal
article.summary: President Luiz Inacio Lula da Silva maintained his lead in polls on the Brazilian presidential election against Senator Flavio Bolsonaro, who is weighed down by his ties to a former banker involved in the country’s biggest bank fraud scandal.

headline: Bitcoin Plunges 50% Amid Rising Network Activity

article.summary: Activity on the Bitcoin network is surging, CryptoQuant said, but it's not correlating with price movement for its native asset.

headline: Axelar Bridge Loses $4.67M in 7-Day Crypto Hack

article.title: Secret Network’s Axelar bridge drained for $4.67 million in infinite-mint exploit that went unnoticed for seven days
article.summary: Secret Network says about $770,000 of the stolen funds still sits in the attacker's Axelar wallet, and that Axelar declined its request to freeze it.

headline: Schwab, Cboe Launch $SPX Binary Options Today

article.title: Charles Schwab is working with Cboe to launch S&P 500 ‘yes-or-no’ binary options contracts: WSJ
article.summary: The binary contracts would mark the brokerage's first move into prediction-market-style products, a sector that Kalshi and Polymarket already dominate.
